title: MyCR Review Report 2026-07-02
overview: 本轮按全量 MyCR 路径刷新 43 个 open PR，先处理上一轮已 approve 且当前 green 的 #2026，再复核候选 PR。结果：#2026 和 #2039 已 LGTM/squash merge；#2017、#2041、#2045、#2049、#2051 共发布 10 条 inline blocker 并提交 request changes；WineChord 自己的 #2056/#2052 只做维护审计，没有 self-review/self-merge。最终 open PR 为 41 个，剩余 34 个按 draft/WIP、pending/head moved、CI hard gate、merge conflict、existing blocker/locked risk 分组。#2028 当前已不再 locked，但仍有已验证的并发/资源边界 blocker；#1400/#1183 仍是 locked PR。

approved.title: session/postgres: surface init failures as errors and fail on missing unique index
approved.author: hyprh
approved.technical_background: PostgreSQL session init must fail visibly when schema/index verification is unsafe, and it must close the opened client on initDB failure so callers do not inherit a leaked connection.
approved.problem: Previous review asked to close pgClient when initDB fails; the current head added that close path and matching sqlmock ExpectClose coverage.
approved.approach: Verified service.go and tests at current head, confirmed all effective checks including codecov/patch were green, then approved/merged with --match-head-commit.
approved.design_assessment: The fix is local to the init error path and preserves the intended schema verification behavior.
approved.tests_docs: GitHub effective checks were green; no local test rerun was needed after CI and targeted diff verification.
approved.attention_points: Merged after stale blocker audit confirmed the old thread was fixed.
approved.outcome: Submitted LGTM earlier and squash merged this run. merge commit: fa78309912ac27d3513ce4599cd864c51dedd2d3
approved.risk: Low after CI and blocker verification.

approved.title: feat(sandbox): add macOS sandbox backend
approved.author: cuboya
approved.technical_background: The macOS Seatbelt backend maps the repository sandbox permission profile into SBPL rules; the key safety question was whether workspace roots and host temp/cache defaults preserved the same containment boundary as the existing sandbox code.
approved.problem: Previous blockers covered workspace symlink escape and overly broad host temp/cache reads.
approved.approach: Verified current head routes workspace-looking absolute grants through resolveWorkspacePath, limits macOS temp/cache defaults to ancestor metadata, and has green effective checks including codecov/patch.
approved.design_assessment: The current design keeps Linux behavior separate via build tags while tightening macOS path containment and default read policy.
approved.modules: codeexecutor/sandbox/*; openclaw/app/*; sandbox docs and examples
approved.tests_docs: GitHub effective checks were all green; subagent read-only review found no blocker at e72eccaf5f2b449c8626bd98f79f0035329b55a0.
approved.attention_points: CodeRabbit left only trivial/nitpick suggestions; not a merge blocker.
approved.outcome: Submitted LGTM and squash merged. merge commit: dcd08c5c4dbf41ef19d28d72058db8aa9e23b270
approved.risk: Low to medium; OS sandbox behavior is sensitive, but the reviewed blockers are fixed and CI is green.

commented.title: fix: use UPDATE instead of DELETE for soft delete in rotateMemory
commented.author: shanghai-Jerry
commented.ci_state: checks: pass:162, pending:0, fail:0; merge: BLOCKED; review: CHANGES_REQUESTED
commented.technical_background: mysqlvec rotateMemory uses soft-delete semantics and should be able to rotate A -> B -> A by reviving an existing soft-deleted row instead of exercising only the target-missing path.
commented.problem: The revive regression test still returns sql.ErrNoRows in the target pre-check, so it does not cover a soft-deleted target row.
commented.approach: Verified service.go distinguishes no target from targetActive=false, and anchored the blocker on the test setup line that currently returns sql.ErrNoRows.
commented.risk: A regression in revive semantics can pass because the test never proves the deleted target path.
commented.problem_framing: The revive regression test still returns sql.ErrNoRows in the target pre-check, so it does not cover a soft-deleted target row.
commented.root_cause: The revive regression test still returns sql.ErrNoRows in the target pre-check, so it does not cover a soft-deleted target row.
commented.design_assessment: Verified service.go distinguishes no target from targetActive=false, and anchored the blocker on the test setup line that currently returns sql.ErrNoRows.
commented.tests_docs: No local test mutation; finding was verified by source/diff inspection and GitHub effective state.
commented.attention_points: Submitted REQUEST_CHANGES review with inline comments; comment URLs were validated by the GitHub API response.
commented.outcome: Posted blocking inline review comments and submitted request changes.

inline_comments.body:
`TestService_UpdateMemory_SoftDelete_RotateMemory_ReviveDeletedRow` still returns `sql.ErrNoRows`, so it exercises the no-target path instead of reviving an existing soft-deleted target. Return `active=false` from this pre-check and keep the no-target case separate so the A -> B -> A regression is actually covered.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这个测试名声称覆盖 revive 已软删除目标，但这里返回的是 `sql.ErrNoRows`，实际只跑了目标不存在路径。建议让这个 pre-check 返回 `active=false`，另保留独立的 no-target 用例，这样 A -> B -> A 回归才真正被覆盖。
</details>
inline_comments.summary: `TestService_UpdateMemory_SoftDelete_RotateMemory_ReviveDeletedRow` still returns `sql.ErrNoRows`, so it exercises the no-target path instead of reviving an existing soft-deleted target. Return `active=false` from this pre-check and keep the no-target case separate so the A -> B -> A regression is actually covered.

commented.title: {evolution, openclaw, docs}: add rollback API and pending_approval auto-expire
commented.author: Rememorio
commented.ci_state: checks: pass:162, pending:0, fail:0; merge: BLOCKED; review: CHANGES_REQUESTED
commented.technical_background: pending_approval auto-expire reuses ApprovalService.Decide, so the same state-transition path must be safe when a background sweeper and a human decision race at the timeout boundary.
commented.problem: autoPromote calls Decide, but the approve path is still read-then-publish/write rather than conditional, so timeout auto-approve can overwrite a concurrent human decision.
commented.approach: Verified the earlier custom store/pointer blocker is fixed, then posted a new blocker on the current Decide call site.
commented.risk: Audit state and live skill state can diverge if a human reject races with auto-expire.
commented.problem_framing: autoPromote calls Decide, but the approve path is still read-then-publish/write rather than conditional, so timeout auto-approve can overwrite a concurrent human decision.
commented.root_cause: autoPromote calls Decide, but the approve path is still read-then-publish/write rather than conditional, so timeout auto-approve can overwrite a concurrent human decision.
commented.design_assessment: Verified the earlier custom store/pointer blocker is fixed, then posted a new blocker on the current Decide call site.
commented.tests_docs: No local test mutation; finding was verified by source/diff inspection and GitHub effective state.
commented.attention_points: Submitted REQUEST_CHANGES review with inline comments; comment URLs were validated by the GitHub API response.
commented.outcome: Posted blocking inline review comments and submitted request changes.

inline_comments.body:
`autoPromote` calls `ApprovalService.Decide`, but that approve path is still read-then-publish/write rather than conditional. If a human approve/reject races after the sweeper reads `pending_approval` but before it publishes and writes `active`, the timeout path can overwrite the human decision; serialize or CAS `Decide` per revision and return `ErrAlreadyDecided` without publishing when status changed.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
`autoPromote` 虽然复用了 `ApprovalService.Decide`，但 approve 路径本身仍是先读状态再 publish/write，而不是条件更新。如果人工 approve/reject 在 sweeper 读到 `pending_approval` 之后、发布并写入 `active` 之前发生，超时路径仍可能覆盖人工决定。建议按 revision 串行化或对 `Decide` 做 CAS；状态已变化时直接返回 `ErrAlreadyDecided`，不要再发布。
</details>
inline_comments.summary: `autoPromote` calls `ApprovalService.Decide`, but that approve path is still read-then-publish/write rather than conditional. If a human approve/reject races after the sweeper reads `pending_approval` but before it publishes and writes `active`, the timeout path can overwrite the human decision; serialize or CAS `Decide` per revision and return `ErrAlreadyDecided` without publishing when status changed.

commented.title: feat: add tool execution safety guard for secure command scanning and…
commented.author: everfid-ever
commented.ci_state: checks: pass:162, pending:0, fail:0; merge: BLOCKED; review: CHANGES_REQUESTED
commented.technical_background: The tool safety guard is a runtime permission policy for exec-like tools; host extraction must fail closed for curl options that can redirect endpoints or load opaque config.
commented.problem: Previous bare-host and policy-copy blockers were fixed, but curl -K/--config and endpoint rewrite options such as --connect-to/--resolve still bypass or hide effective egress hosts.
commented.approach: Verified rules.go still skips -K/--config as a value option and still applies generic colon stripping to host-bearing curl option operands.
commented.risk: A command can appear allowed for github.com while routing to an attacker-controlled host or config-defined endpoint.
commented.problem_framing: Previous bare-host and policy-copy blockers were fixed, but curl -K/--config and endpoint rewrite options such as --connect-to/--resolve still bypass or hide effective egress hosts.
commented.root_cause: Previous bare-host and policy-copy blockers were fixed, but curl -K/--config and endpoint rewrite options such as --connect-to/--resolve still bypass or hide effective egress hosts.
commented.design_assessment: Verified rules.go still skips -K/--config as a value option and still applies generic colon stripping to host-bearing curl option operands.
commented.tests_docs: No local test mutation; finding was verified by source/diff inspection and GitHub effective state.
commented.attention_points: Submitted REQUEST_CHANGES review with inline comments; comment URLs were validated by the GitHub API response.
commented.outcome: Posted blocking inline review comments and submitted request changes.

inline_comments.body:
`curl -K/--config` is skipped as an ordinary value option, but that file can contain `url`, `proxy`, `resolve`, and other egress controls. Deny or require review for opaque curl config files unless the guard safely parses them, and add coverage for the bypass.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
`curl -K/--config` 现在被当作普通取值参数跳过，但配置文件里可以包含 `url`、`proxy`、`resolve` 等真实外连控制。除非 guard 能安全解析该文件，否则应直接 deny/ask，并补上绕过测试。
</details>
inline_comments.summary: `curl -K/--config` is skipped as an ordinary value option, but that file can contain `url`, `proxy`, `resolve`, and other egress controls. Deny or require review for opaque curl config files unless the guard safely parses them, and add coverage for the bypass.

inline_comments.body:
`extractHosts` still treats curl endpoint-rewrite operands as generic `host:port` text, so `--connect-to github.com:443:evil.io:443` and `--resolve github.com:443:1.2.3.4` can pass when only `github.com` is allowed. Parse or fail closed on curl host-bearing options before this generic colon stripping, including `--flag=value` forms.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
`extractHosts` 仍把 curl 的 endpoint rewrite 参数当作普通 `host:port` 处理，所以 `--connect-to github.com:443:evil.io:443` 和 `--resolve github.com:443:1.2.3.4` 会在只允许 `github.com` 时通过。建议在这里做通用冒号截断前，先解析或 fail closed 这些带 host 的 curl 选项，包括 `--flag=value` 形式。
</details>
inline_comments.summary: `extractHosts` still treats curl endpoint-rewrite operands as generic `host:port` text, so `--connect-to github.com:443:evil.io:443` and `--resolve github.com:443:1.2.3.4` can pass when only `github.com` is allowed. Parse or fail closed on curl host-bearing options before this generic colon stripping, including `--flag=value` forms.

commented.title: test: add replay consistency harness
commented.author: Spock12138
commented.ci_state: checks: pass:162, pending:0, fail:0; merge: BLOCKED; review: CHANGES_REQUESTED
commented.technical_background: Replay consistency docs must describe exactly what the normalizer/comparator actually checks, otherwise backend authors may chase a guarantee that tests deliberately ignore.
commented.problem: The docs claim SummaryBoundary last event ID is compared, but implementation tests show LastEventID is intentionally ignored during summary normalization.
commented.approach: Posted an English-doc inline blocker and called out the Chinese doc needs the same sync.
commented.risk: The documented replay contract overstates comparison strength and can mislead future backend implementations.
commented.problem_framing: The docs claim SummaryBoundary last event ID is compared, but implementation tests show LastEventID is intentionally ignored during summary normalization.
commented.root_cause: The docs claim SummaryBoundary last event ID is compared, but implementation tests show LastEventID is intentionally ignored during summary normalization.
commented.design_assessment: Posted an English-doc inline blocker and called out the Chinese doc needs the same sync.
commented.tests_docs: No local test mutation; finding was verified by source/diff inspection and GitHub effective state.
commented.attention_points: Submitted REQUEST_CHANGES review with inline comments; comment URLs were validated by the GitHub API response.
commented.outcome: Posted blocking inline review comments and submitted request changes.

inline_comments.body:
The docs promise `SummaryBoundary` last-event-ID comparison, but the implementation normalizes summaries by ignoring `LastEventID` and has a test for that behavior. Remove the last-event-ID claim here and in the Chinese doc, or change the implementation to compare a stable semantic boundary ID.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
文档承诺会比较 `SummaryBoundary` 的 last event ID，但实现会在归一化时忽略 `LastEventID`，并且有测试明确覆盖这个行为。请同步删除英文和中文文档里的 last event ID 承诺，或者改实现去比较稳定的语义边界 ID。
</details>
inline_comments.summary: The docs promise `SummaryBoundary` last-event-ID comparison, but the implementation normalizes summaries by ignoring `LastEventID` and has a test for that behavior. Remove the last-event-ID claim here and in the Chinese doc, or change the implementation to compare a stable semantic boundary ID.

commented.title: session/replaytest: add multi-backend replay consistency test framework
commented.author: xiaosansh
commented.ci_state: checks: pass:166, pending:0, fail:0; merge: BLOCKED; review: CHANGES_REQUESTED
commented.technical_background: session/replaytest is intended as a multi-backend consistency framework, so comparator coverage and harness failure modes become part of the storage/session contract.
commented.problem: The framework currently drops allowed diffs from reports, misses event StateDelta/Extensions, lacks real filter-key summary cases, ignores session-scope DeleteKey, and silently passes track steps on non-track backends.
commented.approach: Verified each finding against current head and posted five inline blockers across comparator, cases, and harness code.
commented.risk: Backends can pass replay while losing event payloads, keyed summaries, session deletes, or entire track writes.
commented.problem_framing: The framework currently drops allowed diffs from reports, misses event StateDelta/Extensions, lacks real filter-key summary cases, ignores session-scope DeleteKey, and silently passes track steps on non-track backends.
commented.root_cause: The framework currently drops allowed diffs from reports, misses event StateDelta/Extensions, lacks real filter-key summary cases, ignores session-scope DeleteKey, and silently passes track steps on non-track backends.
commented.design_assessment: Verified each finding against current head and posted five inline blockers across comparator, cases, and harness code.
commented.tests_docs: No local test mutation; finding was verified by source/diff inspection and GitHub effective state.
commented.attention_points: Submitted REQUEST_CHANGES review with inline comments; comment URLs were validated by the GitHub API response.
commented.outcome: Posted blocking inline review comments and submitted request changes.

inline_comments.body:
`filterAllowedDiffs` removes matched allowed diffs entirely, so the JSON report cannot show `allowed_diffs` or explain why an accepted backend difference was ignored. Keep matched records with `SeverityAllowed`, `AllowedDiff`, and `Explanation`, then fail only when non-allowed diffs remain.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
`filterAllowedDiffs` 会把命中的 allowed diff 直接删掉，导致 JSON 报告无法展示 `allowed_diffs`，也无法解释某个后端差异为什么被接受。建议保留这些记录并标成 `SeverityAllowed`，填上 `AllowedDiff` / `Explanation`，最终只在存在非 allowed diff 时失败。
</details>
inline_comments.summary: `filterAllowedDiffs` removes matched allowed diffs entirely, so the JSON report cannot show `allowed_diffs` or explain why an accepted backend difference was ignored. Keep matched records with `SeverityAllowed`, `AllowedDiff`, and `Explanation`, then fail only when non-allowed diffs remain.

inline_comments.body:
Event comparison ignores `StateDelta` and `Extensions`, so a backend can drop event state changes or extension payloads while replay still passes. Compare canonicalized state deltas and non-private extensions, with negative tests for both.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
事件比较没有检查 `StateDelta` 和 `Extensions`，因此后端丢掉事件状态变更或扩展 payload 时 replay 仍可能通过。建议比较规范化后的 state delta 和非私有 extensions，并为两类缺失补负向测试。
</details>
inline_comments.summary: Event comparison ignores `StateDelta` and `Extensions`, so a backend can drop event state changes or extension payloads while replay still passes. Compare canonicalized state deltas and non-private extensions, with negative tests for both.

inline_comments.body:
All built-in summary replay cases use an empty `FilterKey`, so the harness never proves that backends persist and retrieve keyed summaries correctly. Add a built-in non-empty filter-key summary case instead of only testing filter-key diffs with synthetic comparator maps.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
当前内建 summary replay case 全部使用空 `FilterKey`，所以 harness 从未证明后端能正确持久化和读取带 key 的 summary。建议增加一个非空 filter-key 的内建 summary case，而不是只在 synthetic comparator map 里测试 filter-key 差异。
</details>
inline_comments.summary: All built-in summary replay cases use an empty `FilterKey`, so the harness never proves that backends persist and retrieve keyed summaries correctly. Add a built-in non-empty filter-key summary case instead of only testing filter-key diffs with synthetic comparator maps.

inline_comments.body:
`UpdateStateStep.DeleteKey` is ignored for session-scoped state because the default branch always calls `UpdateSessionState`. Implement session delete/clear semantics, or return an execution error for `ScopeSession` deletes until the service contract supports them.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
`UpdateStateStep.DeleteKey` 对 session scope 会被忽略，因为 default 分支总是调用 `UpdateSessionState`。请实现 session 状态删除/清理语义，或者在服务契约支持前对 `ScopeSession` delete 返回执行错误。
</details>
inline_comments.summary: `UpdateStateStep.DeleteKey` is ignored for session-scoped state because the default branch always calls `UpdateSessionState`. Implement session delete/clear semantics, or return an execution error for `ScopeSession` deletes until the service contract supports them.

inline_comments.body:
`AppendTrackStep` silently succeeds when the backend does not implement `session.TrackService`, which lets track replay pass without persisting anything. Return an execution error here; unsupported track backends should be skipped by profile before the step runs.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
当后端没有实现 `session.TrackService` 时，`AppendTrackStep` 现在会静默成功，这会让 track replay 在没有任何持久化的情况下通过。这里应返回执行错误；不支持 track 的后端应该在 profile 阶段被 skip，而不是运行时静默放过。
</details>
inline_comments.summary: `AppendTrackStep` silently succeeds when the backend does not implement `session.TrackService`, which lets track replay pass without persisting anything. Return an execution error here; unsupported track backends should be skipped by profile before the step runs.

`Scan` first deny wins，违反 most severe result 契约。

`WithPolicy` 浅拷贝 map/slice，调用方后续修改会影响运行中策略或产生竞态。
